hooks.command: [ -f config/sources.md ] && [ -f config/targets.md ] && echo '[ready] config validated' || echo '[warn] missing config/sources.md or config/targets.md'

input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"'); desc=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // "-"'); [ "$agent" = "unknown" ] && exit 0; mkdir -p results/logs && echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')|$agent|$desc|START" >> results/logs/subagent.log

input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"'); [ "$agent" = "unknown" ] && exit 0; duration=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.totalDurationMs // 0'); tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.totalTokens // 0'); mkdir -p results/logs && echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')|$agent|END|${duration}ms|${tokens}tokens" >> results/logs/subagent.log; if echo "$input" | jq -e '.tool_response.error' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')|$agent|ERROR" >> results/logs/errors.log; fi

input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // ""'); echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE 'execute.*(pipeline|AGENTS\.md)|run.*pipeline|start.*pipeline' || exit 0; mode=concise; echo "$prompt" | grep -qi 'detailed' && mode=detailed; strategy=conservative; echo "$prompt" | grep -qi 'ambitious' && strategy=ambitious; mkdir -p results/logs && echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')|$mode|$strategy" >> results/logs/mode_log.txt
